title: Create: Right Hand
description: Added some chain interation for create.
body:
This mod add some iterations for create. Here are functions the mod adds in the tabel

|Function       |Description    |
|---------------|---------------|
|Chain Encase   |Player can chain encase or decase for shaft, belt or fluid pipe.( Default key is Alt)|
|Change Pipe Openning|Player can right click (encased) fluid pipe to open or close the openning on the face( Press Shift can change the opposite face)|
|Off Hand Encase|Player can placed encased shaft, chute, cogwheel and so on when hold casing by off hand|
|Encase view|When player hold casing and press Alt want to chain encase for something, player can see what block will be encased|

Here are the compatible mods of Create: Right Hand.
|Mod|Need Version(CRH)|Description|
|--------|--------------|------------|
|FTB Ultimine|1.4.0+|Player can chain encase, decase or use wrench to remove the blocks of Create.|
|Create: Encase|1.4.0+|Create: Right Hand allow all casing from Create: Encase|

Here are the functions will be add in the future.
|Function|Description|
|---------|----------|
|District Encase|Player can select a area to encase|
|Create: Copycats+ compat|Player can chain change the block that copycat block copyed|
